title: Gmail integration - Naming the pulse

posts.author: micah (Micah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m new to integrations, and haven’t been able to figure out the answer to using gmail integrations.

We are using Monday for our sales process. We have set up gmail integrations, so that a new email automatically creates a new pulse. However, the emails we receive all have the same subject. Is there a way to set it so that the new pulse created is named after another part of the email, such as the Sender name or sender email address?
